channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Starmer says UK will not support US blockade of Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Other US allies criticise Trump's move, including France, Spain and Turkiye, and China also condemns the plan.

item.title: US blockade of Iran would worsen global energy crisis, analysts say
item.description: While US military says it will blockade Iranian ports only, move would have ripples worldwide, according to analysts.

item.title: What Iran is saying about US plan to blockade ports
item.description: Iran’s military has called US blockade plans in the Strait of Hormuz an “act of piracy”.

item.title: Refugee in my own city: Surviving Tehran’s bombing, with my cat for company
item.description: Despite the relentless bombing, Sana refuses to flee Tehran, clinging to resilience and fleeting moments of normalcy.

item.title: Ghanaian footballer Dominic Frimpong killed in armed attack on team bus
item.description: Berekum Chelsea's Dominic Frimpong died when armed robbers attacked the Ghana Premier League team travelling home.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 45 of the US-Iran conflict?
item.description: The move to blockade the Strait of Hormuz is the latest escalation in the war after failure to sign peace deal.

item.title: ‘Terrible for foreign policy’: Trump attacks Pope Leo after peace appeal
item.description: Leo, ​who last year became the first US-born pope, has emerged as an outspoken critic of the US-Israeli ⁠war on Iran.

item.title: Oil prices surge past $103 a barrel after US announces blockade of Iran
item.description: Asian stocks fall as naval blockade threat injects new turmoil into financial markets.

item.title: US military threatens to blockade all Iranian ports starting on Monday
item.description: Vessels will still be able to transit the Strait of Hormuz to and from non-Iranian ports, says US Central Command.

item.title: Iran war live: US military says it will block Iranian traffic in Hormuz
item.description: CENTCOM says the blockade will begin at 14:00 GMT, as Iran warns of even higher prices at the pump.
